meaning: adj.[电子]耿氏效应的,基于耿氏效应的
examples: Gunn fumbled away the opening kick-off for the second straight week.
After the doctor had finished, I told them my story, and about Ben Gunn.
Hugh Gunn, 67, was diagnosed with severe prostate cancer seven years ago, but has not broken a bone.
Outside of the tribute, Beck covered Walking In The Sand, Sleepwalk and The Peter Gunn Theme.
